user_query:
I’ve dumped a handful of exhibition/grant announcements into input/calls and I’d rather not spend my life squinting at them. Please do the following so I can get back to painting:

1) Read and parse every announcement in input/calls/*.md and cross-check each one against input/calls/index.csv by ID. Only keep announcements whose ID appears in index.csv and whose title and region match the index entry exactly.

2) Use my preferences from input/artist_profile.yaml to decide eligibility. A call is eligible if all of the following hold:
   - Region is one of acceptable_regions.
   - Deadline is within the inclusive deadline_window [earliest, latest].
   - Submission fee (GBP) is <= max_fee_gbp.
   - Prize (GBP) is >= min_prize_gbp.
   - Accepted Mediums has at least one overlap with my mediums.
   - Theme does not contain any excluded terms (case-insensitive substring match), e.g., "AI" or "NFT".
   Also, exclude anything listed in input/history/applied.json (applied_ids).

3) Write a normalized extraction of all cross-checked announcements (eligible or not) to output/normalized_calls.jsonl, one JSON object per line with these fields:
   - id (string)
   - title (string)
   - deadline (ISO 8601 date string, e.g., 2026-07-15)
   - fee_gbp (number)
   - prize_gbp (number)
   - mediums (array of lowercase strings)
   - region (string; exactly "UK" or "Online")
   - theme (string)
   - source (string; from index.csv)
   - consistency (boolean; true iff title and region match index.csv exactly)
   - eligible (boolean; computed using my rules above)

4) From the eligible ones only, write a ranked shortlist to output/shortlist.csv with header and columns: rank,id,title,deadline,region,fee_gbp,prize_gbp. Sort by: prize_gbp (desc), then fee_gbp (asc), then deadline (asc), then id (asc). Rank starts at 1 in the sorted order. All money values must be plain numbers (no currency symbols). Dates must be ISO 8601. Mediums matching logic must be case-insensitive.

If anything is ambiguous, apply common sense and keep it deterministic. I’d like results I can re-check without arguing with a computer, preferably today. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
